heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 450y–7 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated the sum of not to exceed $3,000 for the purpose of acquiring lands, interests in lands, and improvements thereon as may be necessary for carrying out this Act.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , which enacted sections 450y–5 to 450y–7 of this title, and amended . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 86–689section 17j–2 of this title
amendments: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , which enacted sections 450y–5 to 450y–7 of this title, and amended . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 86–689section 17j–2 of this title
